exam_price_notes: $93 exam fee + ~$30 test center fee. Fee waivers for military/low-income.
target_audience: Students who have completed two to three semesters of college German language study
recommended_experience: Knowledge and ability equivalent to that of students who have completed two to three semesters of college German language study

prerequisites.description: Knowledge and ability equivalent to that of students who have completed two to three semesters of college German language study

retake_policy.notes: Each institution reserves the right to set its own credit-granting policy, which may differ from the American Council on Education (ACE). Contact your college to find out the score required for credit and the number of credit hours granted.

objectives.title: Ability to understand spoken language through short stimuli or everyday situations
Ability to understand the language as spoken by native speakers in longer dialogues and narratives
Mastery of vocabulary and structure in the context of sentences
Mastery of vocabulary and structure in the context of paragraphs
Ability to read and understand texts representative of various styles and levels of difficulty (e.g., passages of about 200 words; shorter pieces such as advertisements, signs, etc.)

official_study_resources.title: CLEP German Language Examination Guide
official_study_resources.notes: This guide provides practice questions for the CLEP German Language (Levels 1 and 2) Exam only.

official_study_resources.title: Study Resources: German Language
official_study_resources.notes: A study plan and list of online resources.

official_study_resources.title: Sample Questions: German Language: Levels 1 and 2
official_study_resources.notes: Answer sample questions related to the German Language exam.

official_study_resources.title: German Language Listening Exercise
official_study_resources.notes: Listen to sample questions in this listening section.

official_study_resources.title: What Your CLEP Score Means
official_study_resources.notes: Guide to understanding how CLEP scores are calculated and credit-granting recommendations for all exams.

official_study_resources.title: ACE Credit Recommendations
official_study_resources.notes: Recommendations for credit-granting scores from the American Council on Education.
